chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-15 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 4620/18 3. For Katcha Peshi. 31.01.2019 Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State...... Mr. Amjad Ali, associate of Mr. Mohsin Raza Gopang, Advocate for appellant is present, and on his behalf Ms. Rehana Siddiqui, Advocate, is holding his brief and has filed a statement not pressing this Criminal Acquittal Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
